name: @novomcp/apps
description: NovoMCP Apps - Interactive UI components for drug discovery

scripts.build:molecule-viewer: cross-env INPUT=html/molecule-viewer.html vite build && mv dist/html/molecule-viewer.html dist/apps/molecule-viewer.html
scripts.build:admet-dashboard: cross-env INPUT=html/admet-dashboard.html vite build && mv dist/html/admet-dashboard.html dist/apps/admet-dashboard.html
scripts.build:research-explorer: cross-env INPUT=html/research-explorer.html vite build && mv dist/html/research-explorer.html dist/apps/research-explorer.html
scripts.build:structure-viewer: cross-env INPUT=html/structure-viewer.html vite build && mv dist/html/structure-viewer.html dist/apps/structure-viewer.html
scripts.build:credit-usage: cross-env INPUT=html/credit-usage.html vite build && mv dist/html/credit-usage.html dist/apps/credit-usage.html
scripts.build:faves-dashboard: cross-env INPUT=html/faves-dashboard.html vite build && mv dist/html/faves-dashboard.html dist/apps/faves-dashboard.html
scripts.build:jobs: cross-env INPUT=html/jobs.html vite build && mv dist/html/jobs.html dist/apps/jobs.html
scripts.build:funnels: cross-env INPUT=html/funnels.html vite build && mv dist/html/funnels.html dist/apps/funnels.html
scripts.build:md-results: cross-env INPUT=html/md-results.html vite build && mv dist/html/md-results.html dist/apps/md-results.html
scripts.build:pipeline-audit: cross-env INPUT=html/pipeline-audit.html vite build && mv dist/html/pipeline-audit.html dist/apps/pipeline-audit.html
scripts.build:docking-viewer: cross-env INPUT=html/docking-viewer.html vite build && mv dist/html/docking-viewer.html dist/apps/docking-viewer.html
scripts.build:lead-comparison: cross-env INPUT=html/lead-comparison.html vite build && mv dist/html/lead-comparison.html dist/apps/lead-comparison.html
scripts.build:frontier-orbitals: cross-env INPUT=html/frontier-orbitals.html vite build && mv dist/html/frontier-orbitals.html dist/apps/frontier-orbitals.html
scripts.build:qm-hessian: cross-env INPUT=html/qm-hessian.html vite build && mv dist/html/qm-hessian.html dist/apps/qm-hessian.html
scripts.build:transition-state: cross-env INPUT=html/transition-state.html vite build && mv dist/html/transition-state.html dist/apps/transition-state.html
scripts.build:excited-states: cross-env INPUT=html/excited-states.html vite build && mv dist/html/excited-states.html dist/apps/excited-states.html
scripts.build:redox-potential: cross-env INPUT=html/redox-potential.html vite build && mv dist/html/redox-potential.html dist/apps/redox-potential.html
scripts.build:reaction-thermo: cross-env INPUT=html/reaction-thermo.html vite build && mv dist/html/reaction-thermo.html dist/apps/reaction-thermo.html
scripts.build:materials-project: cross-env INPUT=html/materials-project.html vite build && mv dist/html/materials-project.html dist/apps/materials-project.html
scripts.build:qm-calculation: cross-env INPUT=html/qm-calculation.html vite build && mv dist/html/qm-calculation.html dist/apps/qm-calculation.html
scripts.build:target-discovery: cross-env INPUT=html/target-discovery.html vite build && mv dist/html/target-discovery.html dist/apps/target-discovery.html
scripts.build:clinical-outcomes: cross-env INPUT=html/clinical-outcomes.html vite build && mv dist/html/clinical-outcomes.html dist/apps/clinical-outcomes.html
scripts.build:stratify-patients: cross-env INPUT=html/stratify-patients.html vite build && mv dist/html/stratify-patients.html dist/apps/stratify-patients.html
scripts.build:conformer-search: cross-env INPUT=html/conformer-search.html vite build && mv dist/html/conformer-search.html dist/apps/conformer-search.html
scripts.build:generate-dynamics: cross-env INPUT=html/generate-dynamics.html vite build && mv dist/html/generate-dynamics.html dist/apps/generate-dynamics.html
scripts.build:predict-pka: cross-env INPUT=html/predict-pka.html vite build && mv dist/html/predict-pka.html dist/apps/predict-pka.html
scripts.build:predict-solubility: cross-env INPUT=html/predict-solubility.html vite build && mv dist/html/predict-solubility.html dist/apps/predict-solubility.html
scripts.build:predict-bde: cross-env INPUT=html/predict-bde.html vite build && mv dist/html/predict-bde.html dist/apps/predict-bde.html
scripts.build:nnp-results: cross-env INPUT=html/nnp-results.html vite build && mv dist/html/nnp-results.html dist/apps/nnp-results.html
scripts.build:validate-target: cross-env INPUT=html/validate-target.html vite build && mv dist/html/validate-target.html dist/apps/validate-target.html
scripts.build:results-table: cross-env INPUT=html/results-table.html vite build && mv dist/html/results-table.html dist/apps/results-table.html
scripts.build:cluster-explorer: cross-env INPUT=html/cluster-explorer.html vite build && mv dist/html/cluster-explorer.html dist/apps/cluster-explorer.html
scripts.build:all: tsc --noEmit && mkdir -p dist/apps && npm run build:molecule-viewer && npm run build:admet-dashboard && npm run build:research-explorer && npm run build:structure-viewer && npm run build:credit-usage && npm run build:faves-dashboard && npm run build:jobs && npm run build:funnels && npm run build:md-results && npm run build:pipeline-audit && npm run build:docking-viewer && npm run build:lead-comparison && npm run build:frontier-orbitals && npm run build:qm-hessian && npm run build:transition-state && npm run build:excited-states && npm run build:redox-potential && npm run build:reaction-thermo && npm run build:materials-project && npm run build:qm-calculation && npm run build:target-discovery && npm run build:clinical-outcomes && npm run build:stratify-patients && npm run build:conformer-search && npm run build:generate-dynamics && npm run build:predict-pka && npm run build:predict-solubility && npm run build:predict-bde && npm run build:nnp-results && npm run build:validate-target && npm run build:results-table && npm run build:cluster-explorer
scripts.start: npm run build && npm run serve
scripts.dev: cross-env NODE_ENV=development concurrently 'npm run watch' 'npm run serve'
